properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C4 V5 C6 V7 V8 V9 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Lord I lift my hands to worship There's no other way to make it through the day. When the enemy comes like a flood I know You raise a standard I know You'll lift me up

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: You lift me up, Yes Lord You surely lift me up (No matter what comes our way) You lift me up, Yes Lord You surely lift me up

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When I feel like I'm unworthy It's seems so hard to pray 'cause of the pressure of the day. Then I think of Jonah in the belly of the fish Is getting down to pray

verse.name: C4
verse.lines: You lift me up, Yes Lord You surely lift me up (From the belly of the fish) You lift him up, Yes Lord You surely lift them up (From the valley of the shadow) of death

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: There's nothing without a purpose God always has a reason for the things that we go through. So whether you on the mountain or low down in the valley. There's one thing we must do

verse.name: C6
verse.lines: We'll keep His Word We will keep His Word (No matter what we go through) We keep His Word We will keep His Word

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: When you walk with God You walk alone, You walk alone (Don't you worry, you may cry He won't leave you, he'll be right by your side.)

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: No peril, no sword, no depth, no life No, no death, no principalities, No power will be able to separate us from this love that's in Christ Jesus He will be your friend Right until the end?

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: When you walk with God You walk alone You walk alone
